user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Evertz EQX/EQT router or MAGNUM controller.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the router. Check the IP address and port.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination on the Evertz router.

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC). Defaults to the configured levels.
